//: Emulator-only Firebase config for the rules test suite. It deliberately omits the `hosting` block from the root firebase.json: with framework-aware hosting (hosting.source = frontend), `firebase emulators:exec` tries to detect/emulate the Next.js web framework and fails unless the webframeworks experiment is enabled. The rules tests only need Firestore + Storage, so we point them at this slimmed config via --config. Rules paths are resolved relative to this file (../).
